zh.lifeSummary: 當Mehitabel Dimmock於1642年4月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波時，她的父親Rev. Thomas Dimmock37歲，母親Ann22歲。她於1662年3月30日與Richard Childe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1676年8月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年34歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mehitabel Dimmock于1642年4月16日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波时，她的父亲Rev. Thomas Dimmock37岁，母亲Ann22岁。她于1662年3月30日与Richard Childe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1676年8月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年34岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Dimmock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

variants.name: Dimock
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire, named perhaps from a British word akin to Welsh tymoch ‘pigsty’, but more probably from a Celtic din ‘fort’ + moch ‘swine’. A family of the name Dymoke held the hereditary position of King's Champion for thirty-four generations, starting in the late 14th century when John Dymoke adopted the role following his marriage to Margaret de Ludlow.

nameMeanings.name: Mehitabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God makes happy’ in Hebrew), borne by a character, ‘the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab’, who is mentioned in passing in a genealogy (Genesis 36:39). The name achieved some currency among the Puritans in the 17th century but had gone out of regular use by the 19th century. Nowadays, it is chiefly associated with the companion (a cat) of Archy, the cockroach in the poems of  Don Marquis  (  1927 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mehitabel Dimmock was born on 16 April 1642, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Rev. Thomas Dimmock, was 37 and her mother, Ann, was 22. She married Richard Childe on 30 March 1662, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 18 August 1676, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 34, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mehitabel Dimmock est née le 16 avril 1642, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Rev. Thomas Dimmock, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Ann, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Childe le 30 mars 1662, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1676, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mehitabel Dimmock am 16. April 1642 in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rev. Thomas Dimmock 37 und ihre Mutter Ann 22. Sie hat am 30. März 1662 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Richard Childe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. August 1676 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitabel Dimmock è nata il il 16 aprile 1642 nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Rev. Thomas Dimmock, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Ann, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard Childe il 30 marzo 1662, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 agosto 1676, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mehitabel Dimmockが1642年4月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルで生まれた時，父Rev. Thomas Dimmockは37歳，母Annは22歳であった。1662年3月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでRichard Childeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1676年8月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで34歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Mehitabel Dimmock(이)가 1642년 4월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rev. Thomas Dimmock(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1662년 3월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Richard Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1676년 8월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mehitabel Dimmock nasceu em 16 de abril de 1642, em Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Rev. Thomas Dimmock, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Ann, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Childe em 30 de março de 1662, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1676, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mehitabel Dimmock родилась 16 апреля 1642 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Rev. Thomas Dimmock было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Childe 30 марта 1662 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 августа 1676 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mehitabel Dimmock nació el 16 de abril de 1642, en Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Rev. Thomas Dimmock, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Ann, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Richard Childe el 30 de marzo de 1662, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1676, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
